error_signature: Bad request - please check your parameters Invalid input: image URL is required
title: Image URL required for API request
symptom: The workflow fails with a 'Bad request' error indicating that an image URL is required. This occurs when the API does not accept the image as a binary file.
applies_when: Image is provided as a binary file
not_this_if: Image URL is correctly provided in the request body
root_cause: The api.market API requires the image to be provided as a publicly accessible URL in the request body. If the image is sent as a binary file instead, the API will return a bad request error.
fix_steps: Remove the image download step node from the workflow.
Use a publicly accessible image URL directly in the request body.
agent_instruction: Replace the binary image input with a publicly accessible image URL in the API request.
